title: Link two items within the same board
excerpt:
Currently, users can create two-way connections between items in separate boards with the Connected Boards column, or one-way a link with items within the same board. 
Proposed update: Allow users to create two-way links…

posts.author: jvg1312 (jon@grounded.org)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, users can create two-way connections between items in separate boards with the Connected Boards column, or one-way a link with items within the same board.

Proposed update: Allow users to create two-way links within the same board using Connected Boards columns. This already exists in Notion.

Use Case: Being able to track relationships between Contacts within the Sales CRM. In Notion, I’m able to track who knows who within one database. When I link Person A to Person B, a mirror link to Person A automatically appears next to Person B in their row. This allows me to easily track networks of people in Notion. Monday.com should include this basic functionality.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Very useful for Parent - Child Company relationships in an Accounts Board.

posts.author: ebannister (Elliot Bannister)
posts.cookedHtml: Need this functionality too – also for tracking parent/child relationships
